[@microsoft/fast-element](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [OwnedState](../fast-element.ownedstate/index.html)

## OwnedState type

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
>

A read/write stateful value associated with an owner.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type OwnedState<T> = ReadonlyOwnedState<T> & {
    set(owner: any, value: T): void;
    asReadonly(): ReadonlyOwnedState<T>;
};
```
**References:** [ReadonlyOwnedState](../fast-element.readonlyownedstate/)
